message:
fix(widgets): clarify j/k are vi-navigation, never filter input (bd-2pp0c)

j/k in List::handle_key are intentionally reserved for vi-style
navigation and are never appended to the incremental filter query.
Updated the docstring to document this explicitly and added a test
proving the contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
